description: Expected baseline metrics for metatlas2 system test validation.
note: Values based on successful system test run with 10 LCMS files (20 parquet files total: MS1 + MS2).

lcmsruns.description: LCMS run files: 10 samples × 2 (MS1 + MS2) stored as separate rows

rt_alignment.description: One RT alignment model per analysis

atlases.description: Original atlases plus RT-aligned and auto-IDed versions

ms1_data.description: MS1 extracted data per compound-file combination

ms2_data.description: MS2 raw data per compound-file combination

rt_alignment.description: Minimum acceptable R² for RT alignment model (relaxed for synthetic data)

qc_compounds.description: Number of QC compounds successfully detected (out of 3 total)

istd_compounds.description: Number of ISTD compounds successfully detected (out of 2 total)

ema_compounds.description: Number of EMA compounds successfully detected (out of 5 total)
